prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜约第 34 名（2021–2026 年稳定在第 33–34 名），近年排名稳定；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（实验室爆炸事件），可能对报考心理产生轻微降温影响；抖音热度较热（总排名第 23），关注度一般；土木工程 A+、机械工程 A-、环境科学与工程 A-、电气工程 A-、风景园林学 A-，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏热至高热，对相关专业报考有正向拉动；青 海省 2026 年考生总数约 48000 人（含不确定标记），较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计 47669 人基本持平；重庆大学位于重庆市（西南地区），与青海省同属西部，地理距离适中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动前移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招、考生总数基本持平及声誉偏负面轻微降温，在 2025 年基准 995 名基础上预计竞争略有缓解；预测最低位次约 979 名，区间 832–1126 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics/Science categories was approximately 1559→1180→1383→1174→995, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall, with a cumulative forward shift of about 388 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 995 places; the university's enrollment plan for Physics/Science in Qinghai Province was 23 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 26 in 2024, and dropped back to 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22 students, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 34th (stable at 33rd–34th from 2021 to 2026), stable in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (laboratory explosion incident), which may have a slight cooling effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 23rd overall), with moderate attention; Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-, strong engineering capabilities, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be hot to very hot in social popularity, positively driving applications for related majors; the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (including uncertain marks), basically flat compared to the total of 47,669 for Physics + History categories in 2025; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (Southwest region), in the same western region as Qinghai Province, with moderate geographical distance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the basically flat total number of examinees, and the slight cooling effect of the negative reputation, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 995 places; the predicted minimum ranking is about 979 places, with a range of 832–1126 places.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 832–1126, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<832), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Plan/Electrical); if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>1126), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category/Liberal Arts was approximately 355→431→2136 (abnormal in 2023)→391→433. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the fluctuation range over the past 4 years is 355–433, with a 2025 baseline of about 433. The enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province for History Category/Liberal Arts was 5 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 4 students in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan is 6 students, an increase of 2 students (+50%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 34th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (laboratory explosion incident), which may have a mild cooling effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively high. The Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) corresponds to the law discipline, but Chongqing University's law is not independently rated. The Foreign Languages and Literature category corresponds to foreign languages and literature, also not independently rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity and is recommended, while Chinese Language/Literature is also popular, positively driving applications for liberal arts majors. The total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, roughly the same as in 2025. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, which is in the same western region as Qinghai Province, with moderate geographical distance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+50%), and the roughly stable total number of examinees, competition is expected to ease notably based on the 2025 baseline of 433. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 578, with a range of 491–665.
